Public proof / private intelligence boundary

A proof page is not a marketing page.

The docket makes the public claim auditable: canonical identities, supported claims, unsupported claims, safety posture, replay route, cost/risk boundary, and the exact authority this website refuses to claim.

Download public docket JSONOpen verification
Evidence Docket 6.1claim-bound
01Manifest
02Claims matrix
03Proof packets
04Evaluator posture
05Risk ledger
06Replay path

Public-safe commitments only. Private prompts, raw logs, privileged workpapers, customer data, and secret material are excluded.

Claims matrix

What is claimed

  • Production GitHub Pages website.
  • Read-only operator intent console.
  • Evidence Docket and verification manifest.
  • Canonical contract and token identity display.

What is not claimed

  • No external audit completion.
  • No production fund authorization.
  • No Mainnet transaction broadcast.
  • No autonomous legal or institutional authority.

What must remain human

  • Wallet authorization.
  • Token allowance approval.
  • Mainnet transaction signing.
  • Production activation and release claims.

Canonical evidence anchors

The public room exists to reduce ambiguity. The contract address, AGIALPHA address, chain, production URL, and safety posture are exposed in multiple machine-readable files.

Contract

0xB3AAeb69b630f0299791679c063d68d6687481d1

Token

Production URL

External actions

0 by design.
